statements.sql: UPDATE tgt SET tgt.EnglishProductName = src.ProductName, tgt.LastSeenDate = GETDATE() FROM silver.UpdateJoinTarget AS tgt INNER JOIN bronze.Product AS src ON tgt.ProductAlternateKey = CAST(src.ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25))

refactor.extracted_sql: SELECT tgt.ProductAlternateKey, src.ProductName AS EnglishProductName, GETDATE() AS LastSeenDate FROM silver.UpdateJoinTarget AS tgt INNER JOIN bronze.Product AS src ON tgt.ProductAlternateKey = CAST(src.ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25))
refactor.refactored_sql: WITH import_bronze_product AS ( SELECT CAST(ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25)) AS ProductAlternateKey, ProductName FROM bronze.Product ), import_silver_updatejointarget AS ( SELECT ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName, LastSeenDate FROM silver.UpdateJoinTarget ), logical_joined AS ( SELECT tgt.ProductAlternateKey, src.ProductName, CAST('2024-01-01' AS DATETIME) AS CurrentTimestamp FROM import_silver_updatejointarget AS tgt INNER JOIN import_bronze_product AS src ON tgt.ProductAlternateKey = src.ProductAlternateKey ), final AS ( SELECT ProductAlternateKey, ProductName AS EnglishProductName, CurrentTimestamp AS LastSeenDate FROM logical_joined ) SELECT * FROM final
